title: AVE Record
description: Agentic Vulnerability Enumeration record v1.0.0. Static definition of one behavioral vulnerability class for agentic AI components.

ave_id.description: Unique identifier. Format AVE-YYYY-NNNNN. Immutable once published. Deprecated via status, never deleted or renumbered.

schema_version.description: AVE schema version this record conforms to, e.g. 1.0.0.

published.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the record was first published.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the most recent update.

attack_class.description: Behavioral category. Not a vulnerability_type string.

component_type.description: The kind of agent component this class affects.

behavioral_fingerprint.description: What the component DOES that is dangerous. Behavioral, not a byte signature.

behavioral_vector.description: Tags summarising the attack path, e.g. supply-chain, external-fetch.

aivss_score.description: Top-level shortcut to aivss.aivss_score for quick access.

aivss.description: OWASP AIVSS v0.8 full scoring breakdown.

aarf.description: Agentic Amplification and Risk Factors — 10 sub-scores (0–1 each).

owasp_mcp.description: OWASP MCP Top 10. Format: MCPNN. Required — provides OWASP grounding.

owasp_mapping.description: OWASP Agentic AI Top 10 mappings. Format: ASINN. Optional — add when the class maps to the Agentic Top 10.

mitre_atlas_mapping.description: MITRE ATLAS technique IDs. Format: AML.Txxxx. Optional — add when an ATLAS technique applies. Use an empty array with a note if no technique exists yet.

nist_ai_rmf_mapping.description: NIST AI RMF mappings, e.g. MAP-1.5, MEASURE-2.5. Optional.

affected_platforms.description: Agent platforms known to be affected. Optional — fill in as evidence accumulates.

affected_registries.description: Skill/tool registries where this class has been observed. Optional.

mutation_count.description: Number of distinct real-world mutations observed. Optional.

indicators_of_compromise.description: Observable IOC strings. Required — at least one. Defenders need something actionable.

remediation.description: How to mitigate or prevent the class. Required.

kill_switch_active.description: Whether a registry kill switch is currently active. Optional.

researcher.description: Name of the researcher or team who authored the record. Required — records must be attributable.

researcher_url.description: URL for the researcher or team. Optional.

references.description: Primary sources: CVEs, papers, disclosures. Required — at least one citable source.

evidence_kind_default.description: Scanner default: evidence_kind stamped on findings of this class.

detection_stage.description: Earliest lifecycle stage where this class is detectable.

detection_layer.description: Where in the ecosystem this class surfaces.

confidence_baseline.description: Base confidence for a single-engine match before FP adjustment.

evidence_basis_engines.description: Engines capable of detecting this class.

derivable_into.description: Toxic-flow chain IDs this class can participate in.
